# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Completed the pending drain-loop amendments in the current tree. The real drain journal mapper now recognizes the max-completion-round RunFailed shape, including unknown/stage-commit failure labels with completion-round metadata, and maps it to FailureObservationKind::AmendmentOscillationLimitReached so gj74 ForceComplete recovery can run. The queued-resume path now treats an execute_resume error with a reconciled completed run snapshot as DrainRunOutcome::Completed instead of converting it to a transport/backend failure. Added focused tests for both cases and validated the final tree through the repo's Nix environment.","outstanding_risks":["Live orchestration state under .ralph-burning/projects/vl8z-1 remains modified in the workspace and was left untouched because it is outside review scope.","cargo test --locked passes but still emits pre-existing test-only unused-code warnings; cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings passes cleanly."],"steps":[{"description":"Inspe
